events.caption: goalkeeper gathers the ball at his near post to deny an attacking move as the score stays level, with a close-up replay of the goalmouth scramble
attacking pressure in the box with a shot number 11 in red hits at goal but the keeper and defenders block on the line, scoreline stays 0-0
right-wing attacker taps in at the far post to open the scoring, then wheels away to celebrate in front of the fans as the scoreline changes to 0-1
White-shirted team scores to make it 0-1, players celebrate by the corner flag with replays showing a low finish slotted past the diving keeper at the far post
counterattack down the right, cutback across the six-yard box tucked past the diving keeper into the far corner, followed by player kissing the badge and team celebration

striker slides the ball past the sprawling keeper into the empty net, sparking wild bench and player celebrations before the graphic shows a 0-1 scoreline and players return for the centre-circle restart
Vinicius Junior scoring graphic shown with fans celebrating and flares in the stand, close-up of the scorer and centre-circle restart with the scoreline at 0-1
referee shows a yellow card to number 3 Fabinho, with a replay of the tackle on an opponent in the Liverpool half
number 66 shoots from the edge of the box but the goalkeeper makes the save, ball goes for a goal kick as the attacker holds his head in frustration
attacking side works the ball into the box and forces a scramble in front of goal, with a shot blocked or cleared off the line as defenders react in disbelief
attacking corner or set-piece scramble in the six-yard box, red number 8 gets a shot away but it is blocked by defenders in front of the keeper, play resumes with score still 0-1
attacker in red breaks through on goal but the goalkeeper saves at his feet, ball diverted wide, followed by a corner kick being taken
goalkeeper dives to smother the ball at the near post as attackers close in, then play continues with a corner routine and build-up around 82 minutes
attack builds towards the goal in the second half, goalkeeper in green gathers the ball and prepares to restart with a goal kick
red-shirted attacker in the box forces a low near-post save from the green-shirted goalkeeper, replay shows the keeper diving to keep out the shot
corner or set-piece delivery into a crowded box, goalkeeper claims and catches the ball under pressure from an attacker challenging him at the near post
goalkeeper claims a high ball under pressure from an attacker at a corner or cross before play restarts
goalkeeper in green gathers the ball at his feet under pressure in stoppage time, followed by close-ups of players and midfield play resuming
final whistle celebrations as the winning team's players and substitutes rush onto the pitch to celebrate the 1-0 Champions League final victory
full-time whistle at 90:00 with the winning side 1-0 up, players and substitutes pour onto the pitch celebrating the final victory while beaten opponents sit dejected
Full-time celebrations as the winning team's players run onto the pitch, sliding on their knees and embracing while the losing side in red look dejected, with final score graphic reading 0-1
players in white kneel and celebrate emotionally at full-time as squad and staff mob together on the pitch, while defeated red-shirted players look dejected in a Champions League final ending

Full-time celebrations after the Champions League final as the winning team in white and green mob together on the pitch, players saluting fans in a packed stadium, with a full-time graphic showing the final scoreline 0-1
Full-time scenes at the Champions League Paris Final 2022, winning team and staff mob together in celebration on the pitch while dejected losing players and substitutes look on
players collect winners' medals from officials on the podium during the trophy ceremony after the final
Champions League final winners' medal ceremony on the podium, players receiving medals from officials and celebrating with medals around their necks
players in white receive winners' medals on the podium from dignitaries during the trophy presentation ceremony, one player emotional with medal around neck
Champions League trophy presentation as the captain in white receives the trophy from officials, lifts it and poses with medal-wearing teammates for the winners' team photo
Champions League 2021/2022 winners lift the trophy on the podium amid confetti and fireworks, followed by an aerial night shot of the illuminated stadium
Champions League final trophy celebration under a 'Winners' arch with confetti and fireworks over the stadium, medal-wearing manager on the pitch, full-time graphic showing 0-1
